title: valeriana heterophylla
intro: Valeriana heterophylla, also known as the variegated valerian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a sedative and anti-anxiety agent due to the presence of valerenic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of Valeriana heterophylla include relief from insomnia, restlessness, and anxiety, as well as a decrease in muscle spasms and inflammation. Valeriana heterophylla can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
